---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    include-after-body:
      - js/countdown.js
      
listing:
  - id: countdown
    template: countdown.ejs
    contents: 
      - datetime: May 25, 2026 23:59:00
---

::: grid
::: {#banner_small .g-col-12}
#### BISB211600 (2025/2026)
## Bioinformatics Mini Project Conference

### 25-26 May 2026{style="max-width: fit-content; max-width: -moz-fit-content;"}

#### @ Faculty of Biology, Universitas Gadjah Mada

:::

::: {#countdown .g-col-12}
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .text_block}
### About the BISB211600 Mini Project Showcase

This mini project showcase is organized by students enrolled in **BISB211600 (Bioinformatics)** at Universitas Gadjah Mada. The event highlights student research through **flash talks** and a **mini poster session** modeled after a conference, giving participants an opportunity to present their projects and discuss results with peers and faculty.

The showcase brings together bioinformatics students to share insights from data-driven projects, from computational analysis to biological interpretation. In addition to student presentations, the program includes **guest lectures from invited speakers** who will offer expert perspectives on bioinformatics research and career pathways.

Participants will gain experience in communicating scientific findings in a professional format, with a focus on project storytelling, visual presentation, and collaborative discussion. The showcase is ideal for students and early-career researchers interested in bioinformatics, genomics, and applied data science.

:::

::: {.g-col-6 .img_margin}
![](img/posterbioinfor.png){.img_block width="50%"}

::: {.text-center}
[Guest Lectures](speakers/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

[Program Schedule](program/schedule.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

:::

:::
<div></div>
:::
